google_ai_ultra.name: Google AI Ultra
google_ai_ultra.notes: Google AI Ultra (/mo). Estimated ~1000 msgs/day avg turn 6,400 tokens.

mac_m4_max_128gb.notes: 744B MoE, 40B active params. Requires 128GB+ unified memory. MIT license.

rtx_4090.notes: Estimated from GLM-4.7 architecture (similar to 30-40B dense models).

framework_desktop_128gb.notes: MoE — aggressive TQ1_0 quant needed to fit in 128GB. CPU BLAS benchmarks on OpenBenchmarking.
MoE 1T/32B active. Extremely large — needs 128GB+ unified memory with heavy quantization.

mac_m4_max_128gb.notes: MoE 1T/32B active. Estimated — community reports similar MoE models at 8-12 t/s on M4 Max 128GB.

rtx_4090.notes: Requires 2× RTX 4090 (48GB total) or heavy CPU offloading. Single 4090 ~4-6 t/s with offload.

framework_desktop_128gb.notes: Full unified memory run. Estimated from V3.1 on same hardware class.

mac_m4_max_128gb.notes: Estimated — 685B MoE fits in 128GB with aggressive quant. ~37B active params.

rtx_4090.notes: MoE — only 3B active params per token. Fits in single 24GB GPU.

rtx_3090.notes: MoE — only 3B active params per token.

mac_m3_max_64gb.notes: Estimated from M3 Ultra 8-bit results scaled for M3 Max bandwidth.

rtx_4090.notes: Dense 27B. Community reports 55–65 t/s at Q4_K_M on RTX 4090.

mac_m3_max_64gb.notes: MLX 8-bit benchmark on M3 Ultra 512GB gives 21.3 t/s; M3 Max 64GB similar.

rx_7900_xtx.notes: DC production data: 6 messages, Ryzen 9 3900X, Windows

rtx_4060.notes: DC production data: 6 messages, i7-14700F, Windows

mac_m4_max_128gb.notes: MoE — 10B active params. M5 Max 128GB gives 60.6 t/s; M4 Max estimated slightly lower.

mac_m3_max_128gb.notes: MoE — 10B active. Based on M3 Ultra 8-bit 42.5 t/s benchmark.

framework_desktop_128gb.notes: MoE. DGX Spark (similar unified memory architecture) reports ~38 t/s at Q4.

rtx_4090.notes: DC production data: 1 messages, i9-14900K, Windows

macbook_pro_2019_i9.notes: DC production data: 2 messages, i9-9980HK, macOS

rtx_4090.notes: DC production data: 1 messages, i9-13900KS, Windows

rtx_5090.notes: MoE — only 4B active. Extremely fast for its capability level.

mac_m1_max_64gb.notes: DC production data: 3 messages, M1 Max, macOS

rtx_3080_ti.notes: DC production data: 1 messages, Ryzen 9 9900X3D, Windows

rtx_4060.notes: DC production data: 5 messages, i7-14700F, Windows

rtx_5070.notes: DC production data: 15 messages, Ryzen 7 5700X, Windows
